name: race_results_transform
description: Reformat race-results spreadsheets to the USAT rankings template — browser app + CLI sharing one isomorphic engine.

scripts.e2e:install: npm i -D --prefix ../.. @playwright/test @axe-core/playwright && npx playwright install chromium firefox webkit
scripts.e2e:install:server: npm i -D --prefix ../.. @playwright/test @axe-core/playwright && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium firefox webkit
